# Fadel Moussa

> Official portfolio of Fadel Moussa, a full-stack developer showcasing software projects, technical skills, education, and contact information.

## About

Fadel Moussa is a full-stack developer experienced in building web applications, backend services, APIs, and cloud-based projects.

## Name variants

- Fadel Moussa
- Fadel M. Moussa
- Fadel Mohammad Fadel
- Fadel Mohammad Mosa
- Fadel Mohammad Moussa
- Fadel Mousa
- فاضل محمد فاضل
- فاضل محمد موسى
- فاضل موسى

## Main sections

- [About Fadel Moussa](https://fadelprofile.vercel.app/#about): Professional introduction and profile.
- [Technical Skills](https://fadelprofile.vercel.app/#skills): Programming languages, frameworks, cloud platforms, and development tools.
- [Projects](https://fadelprofile.vercel.app/#projects): Selected software and web development projects.
- [Education](https://fadelprofile.vercel.app/#education): Education and professional training.
- [Contact](https://fadelprofile.vercel.app/#contactme): Contact form and professional profiles.
- [Privacy Policy](https://fadelprofile.vercel.app/privacy.html): Information about contact-form data handling.

## Technologies

React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Firebase, AWS, Google Cloud, Git, and REST APIs.
